# Source and Codex migration

- **Source bundle:** `ru-text-main`
- **Source path:** `skills/ru-text`
- **Integrated pack:** `2026-07-03.1`
- **License status:** See `LICENSE.source.txt` when present.

## Migration notes

The canonical portable skill directory was used; the byte-identical repository-root SKILL.md copy was deduplicated. Claude/Gemini/plugin manifests outside the skill were not registered.
